introSection: Braus & Saus is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster from German firm ART Engineering currently located at Potts Park in Minden, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. The ride was installed by RCS GmbH.
fullText: Braus & Saus is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster from German firm ART Engineering currently located at Potts Park in Minden, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. The ride was installed by RCS GmbH.
